title: descurainia pinnata var. nelsonii
intro: Descurainia pinnata var. nelsonii, also known as Nelson's wallflower or western wallflower, is a flowering plant in the mustard family that grows in the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Descurainia pinnata var. nelsonii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea or tincture.
